query: Russia annual GDP growth rate recent quarters 2025 and Q1 2026, what is the trajectory and latest official figures from Rosstat and Trading Economics
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's a summary of the key findings on Russia's GDP growth trajectory:

**Trajectory: Sharp deceleration through 2025, tipping into contraction in Q1 2026**

- **Q1 2025: +1.4%** → **Q2 2025: +1.1%** → **Q3 2025: +0.6%** → **Q1 2026: −0.2%** (first annual decline since Q1 2023)
- **Full-year 2025: +1.0%** (Rosstat confirmed), a steep drop from a revised **+4.9%** in 2024

**Latest official figure (Q1 2026):** −0.2% YoY, confirmed 17 June 2026, aligned with the preliminary estimate. Sector contractions were led by professional/scientific/technical activities (−6.1%), manufacturing (−1.5%), and transport/storage (−1.8%). The government cut its 2026 forecast to 0.4% (from 1.3%); the Bank of Russia holds a 0.5%–1.5% range.

**Emerging recovery signals (estimates only):** BOFIT reported ~2% YoY growth in the five-core-sectors index for Mar–Apr 2026, and CBR estimated ~1.8% for Q2 2026 — though final Rosstat Q2 2026 data was not yet published as of early July 2026.

Data was cross-validated across Rosstat (via Trading Economics, TASS, Interfax, The Bell) and independent trackers (BOFIT, FocusEconomics). All figures, dates, and sources are captured in the structured output.

sources.title: Russia GDP Annual Growth Rate
sources.snippet: Russian GDP contracted by 0.2% from the previous year in Q1 2026, confirming the first annual decline since Q1 2023; manufacturing -1.5%, professional/scientific/technical -6.1%, transport/storage -1.8%; government downgraded 2026 GDP to 0.4% from 1.3%.

sources.title: Russian GDP Expands 1.4% in Q1 (2025)
sources.snippet: Russia's GDP grew 1.4% in Q1 2025, slowest since Q2 2023; economy ministry had projected 1.7% and projects 2.5% for full-year 2025.

sources.title: Russian GDP Growth Confirmed at 1.4% (Q1 2025)
sources.snippet: Q1 2025 GDP growth confirmed at 1.4%, down from 4.3% in the prior quarter, slowest since Q2 2023.

sources.title: Russian GDP Growth Confirmed at 0.6% (Q3 2025)
sources.snippet: Russia's GDP grew 0.6% YoY in Q3 2025, weakest since 2023, slowing from 1.1% in Q2.

sources.title: Russia GDP Grows 1% in 2025
sources.snippet: Russian GDP expanded 1% in 2025, a slowdown from 4.9% in 2024; above IMF's 0.6% warning.

sources.title: Russia's GDP for Q2 2025 amounts to $591 bln, statistics service says
sources.snippet: Q2 2025 GDP was RUB 49,516.8bn (~$591bn); physical volume grew 1.1% vs Q2 2024; deflator index +3.6% (Rosstat first estimate).

sources.title: Rosstat confirms estimate that Russia's GDP grew 1.0% in 2025
Russian economy stabilising after weak start of the year
sources.snippet: Five-core-sectors composite index grew ~2% YoY in Mar-Apr 2026, up from ~3% contraction in Jan-Feb; ministry estimates GDP grew 1.3% YoY in April 2026.

sources.title: Russia's GDP growth modest and government deficit on the rise
sources.snippet: Rosstat figures show GDP grew 1% y-o-y in first nine months of 2025; growth stayed ~1% in Jan-Oct per ministry.

sources.title: Central Bank maintains forecast for Russia's GDP growth in 2026 at 0.5%-1.5%
sources.snippet: CBR maintains 2026 GDP forecast at 0.5%-1.5% and 1.5%-2.5% for 2027.

sources.title: CBR estimates Russia's GDP growth at 1.8% in Q2, expects 1.6% increase in Q3
sources.snippet: CBR estimated Q2 2026 GDP growth at 1.8% and expected 1.6% in Q3.

sources.title: GDP data — what it reveals, what it conceals
sources.snippet: Russia's economy grew 1% in 2025 per Rosstat; revised 2024 up to 4.9% and 2023 to 4.1%.

sources.title: Russia GDP falls for the first time in three years in Q1 2026
sources.snippet: FocusEconomics headline that Russian GDP fell for the first time in three years in Q1 2026 (page not directly fetchable, 403).
